name_en: MAMAC – Museum of Modern and Contemporary Art
name_local: MAMAC – Musée d'Art Moderne et d'Art Contemporain

phrases.text_local: Deux billets pour adultes, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: duh bee-YAY poor ah-DYOLT seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: MAMAC focuses on French and American avant-garde movements from the 1950s to today, including Yves Klein.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Yves Klein collection is displayed
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la collection permanente d'Yves Klein ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lah ko-lek-SYON pehr-mah-NANT deev KLAYN
phrases.cultural_note: Yves Klein was a Nice native. His iconic IKB (International Klein Blue) works are a highlight of the permanent collection.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a guided tour available in English
phrases.text_local: Proposez-vous des visites guidées en anglais ?
phrases.pronunciation: pro-po-ZAY voo day vee-ZEET gee-DAY on ang-GLAY
phrases.cultural_note: MAMAC offers guided tours in French and sometimes English — check at the reception desk on arrival.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the rooftop terrace view
phrases.text_local: La terrasse panoramique sur le toit est-elle accessible aux visiteurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah teh-RAS pah-no-rah-MEEK soor leh TWAH eh-TEL ak-se-SEEBL oh vee-zee-TUHR
phrases.cultural_note: MAMAC's rooftop terrace offers sweeping views over Vieux-Nice and Castle Hill — free with museum entry.

responses.english: Views of the Mediterranean Sea, Promenade des Anglais, and surrounding mountains.
responses.local: Vue sur la Méditerranée, la Promenade des Anglais et les montagnes environnantes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is permitted in the galleries
phrases.text_local: Les photos sont-elles autorisées dans les salles d'exposition ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay FO-to son-TEL oh-to-ree-ZAY dan lay SAL dek-spo-zee-SYON
phrases.cultural_note: Photography rules vary by exhibition — always check with staff before photographing artworks.
